mapper.select: SELECT p.id as productId, p.product_name as productName, p.price, pc.category_name as categoryName, p.user_id as publisherId, u.username as publisherName, p.create_time as publishTime, pi.image_url as mainImageUrl, p.product_desc as productDesc FROM t_product p LEFT JOIN t_product_category pc ON p.category_id = pc.id LEFT JOIN t_user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN t_product_image pi ON p.id = pi.product_id AND pi.is_main = 1 WHERE p.product_status = 'DRAFT' AND p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.create_time ASC
